last_7_reports.name: Dreambase
last_7_reports.uvp: Dreambase is an AI-powered analytics platform that helps people build data-driven companies without hiring a data team.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: Dreambase needs to scale its technology and expand its customer base.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're building an AI-powered analytics platform, what's the biggest challenge you're facing in terms of product development right now?

last_7_reports.name: Humara
last_7_reports.uvp: Humara is a software company that rebuilds how waste and recycling plants are designed and operated using AI SaaS.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: Humara needs to scale its physics-based design platform and roll out its AI copilot for live plant operations.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're cutting waste plant design cycles from months to days with AI SaaS, how are you handling the technical complexity of your platform?

last_7_reports.name: profitize
last_7_reports.uvp: profitize is an AI-powered financial planning and analysis platform for the hospitality industry.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: profitize needs to expand its technology and enter new European markets.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're scaling AI-powered financial planning for the hospitality sector, what are the biggest technical hurdles you're facing right now?

last_7_reports.name: Ethos
last_7_reports.uvp: Ethos is an expert network with voice onboarding.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: Ethos needs to handle the high volume of experts being onboarded per week.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're onboarding a large number of experts per week, how are you ensuring the scalability of your platform?

last_7_reports.name: Subquadratic
last_7_reports.uvp: Subquadratic is a startup that claims to have built the first large language model to fully escape the mathematical constraint that has defined every major AI system since 2017.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: Subquadratic needs to prove the efficiency of its AI model.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're claiming a significant AI efficiency gain, what's the biggest challenge you're facing in terms of validating your model?

last_7_reports.name: SageOX
last_7_reports.uvp: SageOX is a startup that provides agentic context infrastructure for AI agents.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: SageOX needs to develop a scalable and reliable context infrastructure for AI agents.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're building agentic context infrastructure for AI agents, how are you handling the complexity of integrating with existing systems?

last_7_reports.name: Moritz
last_7_reports.uvp: Moritz is a law firm supercharged with AI.
last_7_reports.pain_signal: Moritz needs to develop and integrate AI technology into its law firm.
last_7_reports.outreach_message: You're building a law firm supercharged with AI, what's the biggest challenge you're facing in terms of product development right now?
